notes: DGIdb genes arrive as symbols; normalized to NCBIGene via the HGNC map. Open Targets genes arrive as Ensembl IDs and are reconciled to the same gene through HGNC.
DGIdb drugs arrive as names with no stable identifier in the sample; kept as name-keyed nodes. A production version would resolve to CHEBI or RxNorm. See mapping_decisions.md.

Open Targets disease IDs arrive in mixed prefixes (EFO, MONDO, DOID, Orphanet, OTAR). Underscores are converted to colons and each disease keeps its original ontology CURIE, which Biolink permits. Single-ontology normalization to MONDO is a planned enhancement. See mapping_decisions.md.
